reviews.comment:
Siempre paramos ahí de camino a Rosario. Es amplio cómodo y tiene juegos para los chicos. Pero algo super negativo, si llegas tipo 21;40 no podés comer !!!! Cierran la cocina y no hacen nada por quién viene de manejar por horas. Cierra el shop a las 22!!! malísimo, debería estar al menos hasta las 24 . Más siendo del ACA. Como socia me siento decepcionada.

(Translated by Google)
We always stop there on the way to Rosario. It's spacious and comfortable and has games for the kids. But one really bad thing is that if you arrive around 9:40 p.m., you can't eat! They close the kitchen and do nothing for those who have been driving for hours. The shop closes at 10 p.m. Terrible. It should be open at least until midnight. Especially since I'm from ACA. As a member, I feel disappointed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMXNxMUNBEAE
